# Nirvik Dhungana

> Frontend developer specializing in React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Based in Kathmandu, Nepal.

## About
Nirvik Dhungana is a frontend developer focused on building accessible, responsive, and performant user interfaces. Currently open to work.

## Skills
- **Frontend:** React, TypeScript, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, HTML5, CSS3
- **Tools & DevOps:** Vite, Git, Docker, Figma, npm/pnpm
- **Backend/Database:** Node.js, Express, MongoDB
